name: Bright Minds Learning Center
shortDescription: Specialized in helping children with dyslexia through evidence-based reading and writing programs.
longDescription: Bright Minds Learning Center has been supporting children with dyslexia for over 10 years. Our certified specialists use the Orton-Gillingham approach combined with modern digital tools to help children build confidence in reading, writing, and spelling. We offer one-on-one and small group sessions tailored to each child's unique learning profile.

name: Focus Forward Coaching
shortDescription: Empowering children with ADHD to build focus, organization, and self-regulation skills.
longDescription: Focus Forward Coaching works with children aged 6-16 diagnosed with ADHD. Our coaches collaborate closely with parents and schools to develop personalized strategies that improve attention span, time management, and emotional regulation. We believe every child with ADHD has unique strengths waiting to be unlocked.

name: Spectrum Care Institute
shortDescription: Comprehensive ABA therapy and social skills development for children on the autism spectrum.
longDescription: Spectrum Care Institute provides Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) therapy, speech therapy, and social skills training for children on the autism spectrum. Our multidisciplinary team of therapists, psychologists, and educators work together to create individualized education plans (IEPs) that support each child's development at their own pace.

name: Number Ninjas Tutoring
shortDescription: Making math accessible and enjoyable for children who struggle with numbers and calculations.
longDescription: Number Ninjas Tutoring specializes in supporting children with dyscalculia — a learning difficulty that affects mathematical understanding. Our tutors use visual, hands-on methods and assistive technology to break down complex math concepts into manageable steps. We focus on building number sense, confidence, and a positive attitude toward mathematics.

name: Speech Steps Therapy
shortDescription: Supporting children with speech delays, stuttering, and language processing difficulties.
longDescription: Speech Steps Therapy offers expert speech and language therapy for children aged 2-18. Our licensed therapists assess and treat a wide range of communication challenges including speech delays, stuttering, articulation disorders, and language processing difficulties. Sessions are engaging, play-based, and designed to make children feel safe and motivated to communicate.

name: Calm & Grow Therapy Center
shortDescription: Occupational therapy focused on sensory integration for children with sensory processing challenges.
longDescription: Calm & Grow Therapy Center provides occupational therapy with a specialization in sensory integration. We support children who are oversensitive or undersensitive to sensory input — helping them regulate their responses to touch, sound, movement, and other sensory experiences. Our therapy gym is equipped with specialized tools to make sessions both therapeutic and fun.

name: ReadRight Literacy Studio
shortDescription: Targeted literacy intervention for children struggling with reading comprehension and writing skills.
longDescription: ReadRight Literacy Studio offers structured literacy programs for children who face challenges with reading comprehension, fluency, and written expression. Our instructors are trained in Wilson Reading System and other evidence-based literacy frameworks. We work closely with parents to extend learning beyond sessions and track measurable progress every step of the way.
